# BlueMax Media — Full Content Index

> BlueMax Media is a creative audiovisual production company founded in 2015, specializing in action sports filmmaking. We create films, commercials, documentaries, and digital content for bold brands and elite athletes across mountain sports, motorsports, and extreme disciplines. Based in France, operating worldwide.

## About BlueMax Media

BlueMax Media was founded in 2015 with a clear identity: athletes filming athletes. Our crews are riders, mountaineers, explorers, and runners — people who move with purpose and create with instinct. This gives us an authentic, cultural understanding of action sports that brands and athletes trust.

We have delivered 100+ productions over 10+ years, working with 50+ elite athletes across the globe.

### Founders

- **Nicolas Roubin** — Business Manager & CGO
- **Jean-Clément Lelard** — Business Manager & Director
- **Julien Eustache** — Executive Producer & Director
- **Etienne Mérel** — Executive Producer & Director

### Team

- Morgan Martin — Editor
- Robin Gerbelot — Camera Operator & Editor
- Geoffroy Le Moal — Drone Pilot
- Candice Bailly-Aubry — Project Manager
- Victor Allard — Colorist
- Simon Mourard — Sound Engineer
- Stephane Guigné — Drone Pilot
- Tom Lafay — Camera Operator
- Julien Regnier — Studio Director

## Services

### Films
Original short films and feature productions capturing authentic human performance and wild landscapes.

### Commercials
High-impact advertising content for global brands, produced in real action environments.

### Documentaries
Long-form documentary projects exploring athletes, expeditions, and sporting culture.

### Content
Social media and digital content for brand campaigns and athlete channels.

## Clients (30+ brands)

Airbnb, Alpe D'Huez, Alpina, Audi, BFGoodrich, Black Crows, CWD Sellier, Cupra, Dope Snow, Faction Skis, Frederique Constant, IWC, Jaeger LeCoultre, Monster, Montec, Mountain Dew, Nespresso, Prada, Puma, Red Bull, Renault, SATA Group, Salomon, Serre Chevalier Vallée Briançon, Skoda, TF1, The North Face, UNX, Volvic, Yamaha

## Athletes Featured

- **Candide Thovex** — Freeride skiing legend
- **Alex Hall** — Freestyle ski X Games champion
- **Jesper Tjäder** — Freeski world champion
- **Sarah Hoefflin** — Olympic gold medalist slopestyle skiing
- **Victor de le Rue** — Freeride World Tour champion
- **Megan Oldham** — Freeski slopestyle specialist
- **Pierre Vaultier** — Olympic gold medalist snowboard cross
- **Coline Ballet-Baz** — Freeride skier
- **Elisabeth Gerritzen** — Freeride skier
- **Sam Anthamatten** — Big mountain skier
- **Matěj Švancer** — Freeski slopestyle
- **Adrian Mattern** — Mountaineer & filmmaker
- **Jules Charraud** — Freeskier
- **Kadi Gomis** — Action sports athlete

## Sports & Disciplines Covered

Advertisement, Bike, Car, Clip, Drone, F1, Freestyle, Horse, Jingle, Kayak, Moto, Motocross, Running, Ski, Slackline, Snowboard, Social content, Speed flying, Speed riding, Sport, TV, Tourism, Trail, Wakeboard, Watches, X Games

150 Hours from home, Abstract, Aeon, Aeros, Aimer le futur, All or nothing love, Alpiner Extreme Automatic, Alta, Anima, Around the ring, Au Coeur des Géants, Audi A1 - Mode intense activé, Audi x Emmanuel Renaut, BFGoodrich, Bonjour it's starting, Champagne, Chile Spirit of the Volcano, Corporate movie 2018, Counting to three, Cruzando Bogotá, Cupra - Padel, DANCER 79, DOPE PHASE 1, Daydreams 1, Daydreams 2, Denvus, Enter the legend, Extreme Automatic, Faction Skis x IWC, Fairy Flight, Floating Shapes, Flying Over Panama City, Fossil Free Island Porto Santo, From Avoriaz With Love, In Paris, Jesper Tjäder Kit 25/26, Jesper Tjäder Kit 24/25, Jesper Tjäder Kit 23/24, MT 07, Making Of In Paris, Manufacture, Mountain Dew, Mt. Hood, Peak Innovation, Portraits, Puma, Recipe, Reshapes, Roots, Serre Chevalier Vallée Briançon - Winter, Shapes, Ski the world, Skiing Through a School, Skoda Aerial, Sugar Bowl, Summer, TF1 Summer, TF1 Winter, The Kit Story, The Reverso Stories Exhibition in Paris, This is running, Tracer 9, Trail, Ténéré 700 Rally Edition, UNX - GT World challenge, Utah to BC, Versatile, Volvic x Airbnb, Walk In The Park, Watches and Wonders 2025, What We Do, Wings vs Wheels, Winter, Winter Holiday, Xgames - Alex Hall, Yacht Commercial, Zermatt To Verbier, Équipe, Étoiles du Sport
